subject: Added apex-pdp to policy
commit_message:
Added apex-pdp to policy

Adding helm chart to deploy the newly created apex-pdp docker image

Issue-ID: POLICY-866
Change-Id: I20d488880ff5198624796f3d3d67431305d374e2
Signed-off-by: mmis <michael.morris@ericsson.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch beijing.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Michael, the OOM would like for folks to post testing results in the comments to show that we did test these changes and they work. Once done, then they can +1 the verify since they don't have a Ci/CD job yet for that step. Please look at Jorge's past submissions for an example.

Also - I would like Jorge to +1 this before it gets merged. I will switch my -1 to +1 when he does so.

Thanks!

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Looks good to me.  I take it that the liveness and readiness checks will come later.

Patch Set 1:

Adding Mahendra/Mayank that did the original policy charts plus others ..
